heading: Approval of loans by the Secretary
label: 3744 Approval of loans by the Secretary
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 1844 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “3702(d)” for “1802(d)”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1989— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in section catchline and wherever appearing in text.Pub. L. 101–237
amendments: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 1844 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “3702(d)” for “1802(d)”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1)1989— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in section catchline and wherever appearing in text.Pub. L. 101–237

children.label: a
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b) of this section, a loan may not be guaranteed under this subchapter unless, before the closing of the loan, it is submitted to the Secretary for approval and the Secretary grants approval.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary may exempt any lender of a class of lenders listed in from the prior approval requirement in subsection (a) of this section if the Secretary determines that the experience of such lender or class of lenders warrants such exemption.section 3702(d) of this title

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary may at any time upon thirty days’ notice require loans to be made by any lender or class of lenders under this subchapter to be submitted to the Secretary for prior approval. No guaranty shall exist with respect to any such loan unless evidence of the guaranty is issued by the Secretary.
